title: Recipe DSL
description: Recipe contract for tools/recipe-engine. DEC-A19 Phase B. Step kinds: mcp.{tool} | bash.{script} | sql.{op} | seam.{name} | gate.{validator} | flow.{seq|parallel|when|until|foreach}. Exactly one kind key per step. `retry` rejected on seam steps (per Q5 escalate-to-human policy).

recipe.description: Recipe slug (kebab-case). Matches the file basename under tools/recipes/.

recipe_version.description: Recipe DSL version. Engine accepts unknown future fields under older schema; explicit version unlocks newer kinds.

inputs.description: JSON Schema describing the inputs object passed to the recipe at run time. Same shape as a draft-07 schema (additionalProperties false recommended).

outputs.description: Mapping of output-key → expression. Expressions reference bound step results via `${step_id.field}` template syntax.

id.description: Step identifier (snake_case). Unique within the recipe; bound results are addressable as `${id.field}`.

bind.description: Optional variable name to bind this step's result to. Defaults to step `id`.

when.description: Optional gate expression. Step is skipped if expression evaluates to falsy. Truthy strings: 'true', non-empty non-zero. Examples: '${prev.ok}', '${count > 0}'.

retry.description: Retry policy for transient failures. NOT permitted on `seam` steps — seam failures escalate to human per Q5 policy.

mcp.description: MCP tool name to invoke (no `mcp__territory-ia__` prefix — engine resolves).

bash.description: Bash script path relative to repo root (or absolute).

sql.description: SQL operation kind. `query` returns rows; `exec` returns affected-row count.

gate.description: Validator name (npm script name; the engine spawns `npm run {gate}`).

items.description: Flow `foreach` items expression — template ref to an array (e.g. `${prev.rows}`). Required for foreach.

as.description: Flow `foreach` per-item variable name. Defaults to `item`.

index_as.description: Flow `foreach` per-item index variable name. Defaults to `index`.

args.description: Arguments object passed to the kind handler. Templated values resolve before dispatch.

input.description: Seam input payload (seam steps only). Templated values resolve before dispatch.
